intentTags: What is this form form for?
What information is required to complete this form?
Angler's Information - Date Of Birth, Residency Status, Fish and Wildlife ID (WID).
Fishing Licence Type or Duration - Annual, eight day, one day
Fishing Region - Vancouver Island , Lower Mainland, Thompson Okanagan, Kootenay Rockies, Cariboo Chilcotin Coast, North Coast Skeena, Peace
Fishing Licence Fees - Cost of different types of licences, including any discounts or exemptions.
